messages.text: A packed field dressing binds your wounds, and they begin to knit closed as you fight on.
A packed field dressing binds {name}'s wounds.
The field dressing draws your wound a little further closed.
The field dressing has done its work and the last of its warmth fades.
The field dressing binding {name}'s wounds has done its work.
{name} wears a packed field dressing that is slowly mending their wounds.
